---
title: "Admin Help Hub"
format:
  html:
    output-file: help_admin.html
execute:
  echo: false
---

This hidden page provides quick access to the repository's internal admin and operations documentation.

These documents are intended for maintainers and template adopters, and are not linked from the public navigation pages.

## Hidden Admin Docs

### Release Process

Operational flow for PR checks and release publication, including DOI reservation, Zenodo draft upload, and manual minting boundary.

[Open `release.html`](release.html)

### Template Setup Guide

Step-by-step setup for new repositories created from this template, including required GitHub variables/secrets and sandbox-to-production rollout.

[Open `setup.html`](setup.html)
